{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Heaven's Glory constructs
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Heaven's Glory constructs]] were sliced to pieces by the [[flying sword]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c18">''Unsouled'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
